author: @RYjet911

text:
The issue with piracy is that in some cases, such as commercial products it is seen as hindering the industry, where as in other cases it's claimed to be helping the industry, such as the case with child pornography.

Now in neither case does the seller of such products make money, so to be told two completely contrasting reasons to stop piracy makes the issue awkward.

Piracy can be helpful anyway. It helps bring out discussion of the product, therefore causing free marketing.
